messages.content: 请一次性列出当前目录的文件 AND 读取 tsconfig.json 文件（使用多个工具调用）

{
  "content": "{
  "$schema": "https://json.schemastore.org/tsconfig",
  "compilerOptions": {
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
    "declaration": true,
    "declarationMap": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "experimentalDecorators": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "lib": ["DOM", "DOM.Iterable", "ES2023"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "noEmit": true,
    "noEmitOnError": false,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": false,
    "strictPropertyInitialization": false,
    "target": "ES2023",
    "useDefineForClassFields": false,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./ui/src/*"],
      "@mul-agent/*": ["./mul_agent/*"],
      "@skills/*": ["./skills/*"]
    },
    "baseUrl": "."
  },
  "include": [
    "ui/src/**/*",
    "ui/tests/**/*",
    "src/**/*",
    "mul_agent/**/*.pyi",
    "skills/**/*.ts"
  ],
  "exclude": [
    "node_modules",
    "dist",
    "build",
    ".venv",
    "storage",
    "wang",
    "agents",
    "openclaw",
    "**/*.test.ts",
    "**/*.test.tsx"
  ]
}
",
  "lines": 50,
  "totalLines": 50,
  "from": 1,
  "to": 50,
  "path": "tsconfig.json"
}

## 结果汇总

### 当前目录文件列表

| 类型 | 名称 |
|------|------|
| 📁 目录 | `.claude`, `.git`, `.github`, `.transcripts`, `agentrx`, `docs`, `extensions`, `git-hooks`, `node_modules`, `openclaw`, `scripts`, `skills`, `src`, `storage`, `tests`, `ui` |
| 📄 文件 | `.env.example`, `.gitignore`, `.mcp.json`, `.pre-commit-config.yaml`, `AGENTS.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `CLEANUP_REPORT.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `LICENSE`, `mint.json`, `oxfmt.config.json`, `oxlint.json`, `package-lock.json`, `package.json`, `pnpm-lock.yaml`, `pnpm-workspace.yaml`, `pyproject.toml`, `README.md`, `SECURITY.md`, `test_output.txt`, `test.txt`, `tsconfig.json`, `tsconfig.tsbuildinfo`, `VISION.md`, `vitest.config.ts` |

### tsconfig.json 内容

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json.schemastore.org/tsconfig",
  "compilerOptions": {
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
    "declaration": true,
    "declarationMap": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "experimentalDecorators": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "lib": ["DOM", "DOM.Iterable", "ES2023"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "noEmit": true,
    "noEmitOnError": false,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": false,
    "strictPropertyInitialization": false,
    "target": "ES2023",
    "useDefineForClassFields": false,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./ui/src/*"],
      "@mul-agent/*": ["./mul_agent/*"],
      "@skills/*": ["./skills/*"]
    },
    "baseUrl": "."
  },
  "include": [
    "ui/src/**/*",
    "ui/tests/**/*",
    "src/**/*",
    "mul_agent/**/*.pyi",
    "skills/**/*.ts"
  ],
  "exclude": [
    "node_modules",
    "dist",
    "build",
    ".venv",
    "storage",
    "wang",
    "agents",
    "openclaw",
    "**/*.test.ts",
    "**/*.test.tsx"
  ]
}
```

### 关键配置说明

- **目标版本**: ES2023
- **模块系统**: ESNext (bundler 模式)
- **严格模式**: `strict: false`
- **路径别名**: 
  - `@/*` → `./ui/src/*`
  - `@mul-agent/*` → `./mul_agent/*`
  - `@skills/*` → `./skills/*`
